title: Meesho Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Meesho Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Meesho Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Meesho Logistics:
Meesho Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho Logistics!
